nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 路易·皮埃尔·维埃约
nodes.summary: 路易·皮埃尔·维埃约是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联90种鸟类，包括草黃樹鴨、环颈鸭、赤琵嘴鴨等90种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 气候变化
nodes.summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。

nodes.name: 双色树燕
nodes.summary: 双色树燕（Tree swallow，学名 Tachycineta bicolor），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联5个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括气候变化。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Found in the Americas, the tree swallow was first described in 1807 by French ornithologist Louis Vieillot as Hirundo bicolor

links.key: bird-双色树燕-bd47af1a__distributed_in__loc-路易-皮埃尔-维埃约-d872b74a
links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Found in the Americas, the tree swallow was first described in 1807 by French ornithologist Louis Vieillot as Hirundo bicolor

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It occasionally breeds further south in the US, and vagrants are sometimes found in the Arctic Circle, the northern Pacific, Greenland, and Europe. The wintering range is from California and southwestern Arizona in the west and southeastern Virginia in the east south along the Gulf Coast to the West Indies, Panama, and the northwestern South American coast. While migrating, this swallow often uses stop-over sites, spending an average of 57 days at these areas during autumn

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Breeding can start as soon as early May, although this date is occurring earlier because of climate change, and it can end as late as July
